title: begonia subalpestris
intro: Begonia subalpestris, also known as the alpine begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is known for its unique, rhizomatous growth habit. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The leaves and stems of Begonia subalpestris can be used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which may offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing stress.
